case_title: MARQUEZ, VICENTE VS CHALKER, RAYMOND OWN.& MANAG/C/O RAWHIDE II C/BAR.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-20-1997, DENIED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $473.50 AS TO DEFENDANT CHALKER, RAYMOND OWN.& MANAG/C/O RAWHIDE II C/BAR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHALKER, RAYMOND OWN.& MANAG/C/O RAWHIDE II C/BAR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $363.50 FILED BY MARQUEZ, VICENTE AS TO DEFENDANT CHALKER, RAYMOND OWN.& MANAG/C/O RAWHIDE II C/BAR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARQUEZ, VICENTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHALKER, RAYMOND OWN.& MANAG/C/O RAWHIDE II C/BAR. $363.50 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $398.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
